name: frank — cluster-admin
postCreateCommand: uv tool install --python 3.13 'git+https://github.com/derio-net/super-fr#subdirectory=packages/fr'; mkdir -p ~/.kube ~/.talos; if [ -n "$KUBECONFIG_B64" ]; then echo "$KUBECONFIG_B64" | base64 -d > ~/.kube/config && chmod 600 ~/.kube/config; fi; if [ -n "$TALOSCONFIG_B64" ]; then echo "$TALOSCONFIG_B64" | base64 -d > ~/.talos/config && chmod 600 ~/.talos/config; fi

fr.purpose: cluster-touching runs (kubectl/talosctl from inside isolation) — non-default, operator-selected only
